title: KitchenPerfected 2 Slice Sandwich & Omelette Maker - Non-Stick - Portable - E2605WH - White
features: NON-STICK SCALLOPED COOKING PLATES: The non-stick surface makes for easier removal of toasted sandwiches. It also makes it much easier to clean! The scalloped shape of the plate creates a clean, easily sliced split across the sandwich as well as sealed edges, making cutting and eating much more enjoyable!

COMPACT & PORTABLE: The neat, compact design complete with carry handle allows for easy storage and transportation. Not just for use in the home kitchen, this appliance can be used in a wide range of settings providing there is a safe electrical supply. As this can be transported so easily and there aren't any naked flames why not consider it for your next camping trip?

TEMPERATURE & POWER INDICATORS: Once the unit is plugged in you will see a red power light to indicate the heating element is in use. The adjacent, green indicator will light up when the toaster is at optimum temperature for cooking.

LOCKING LID: Once you have your sandwich in place, you can clamp down the lid and lock it in to place easily. This will produce the best results making sure the sandwich or omelette is thoroughly cooked and the sandwich sides are sealed to avoid any mess when eating!
VERSATILE: Not only does this make scrumptious savoury snacks but you can satisfy your sweet tooth with a range of dessert combinations from fruit filled toasties to cakes and pastries.
description: Use this handy and versatile appliance from KitchenPerfected to produce a whole range of sweet and savoury snacks such as toasties, French bread, pastries and omelettes in a matter of minutes. Not just for use in the home kitchen, the neat and compact design comes complete with carry handle allowing for easy storage and transportation. This appliance can be used in a wide range of settings providing there is a safe electrical supply so why not consider this for your next camping trip? When the unit is plugged in you will see a red power light to indicate that the heating element is switched on. The adjacent, green indicator light will come on when the toaster is at optimum temperature for cooking. Once you have your sandwich in place, you can clamp down the lid and lock it in to place easily. This ensures the food is thoroughly cooked through and seals the edges for less mess! The non-stick surface makes it easy to remove toasted sandwiches and makes it much easier to clean! The scalloped shape of the plate creates a clean, easily sliced split across the sandwich as well as sealed edges, making cutting and eating much more enjoyable! Box Includes : KitchenPerfected 2 Slice Sandwich & Omelette Maker Instruction Manual Recipes

specifications_table.Material: ‎Metal (aluminum or stainless steel), non-stick coating, painted white
